title: Data Science Fundamentals
description: An introduction to data acquisition, preparation, exploratory analysis, and foundational data-driven thinking.

title: Data Science
description: Methods for analysing data and building reproducible analytical workflows for practical problems.

title: Data Classification and Clustering Techniques
description: A study of supervised classification and unsupervised clustering techniques for structured data.

title: Entrepreneurship
description: Foundations of innovation, technology entrepreneurship, and the development of value propositions.

title: Introduction to Computer Science
description: An introductory overview of computational thinking, algorithms, programming, and computer systems.

title: Metaheuristic Optimization
description: Nature-inspired optimization methods and their research applications.

title: Advanced Machine Learning Research
description: Research-focused study of advanced machine learning methods and experimental design.
